subcodes.first_line: O handmaids of the Merciful! Render ye thanks unto the Ancient Beauty that ye have been raised up and gathered together
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اماء رحمن شکر کنید جمال قدم را که در این قرن اعظم و عصر منور محشور شدید
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @role and station of women, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @firmness in the Covenant
